name: Drumstick Cheese Cake (Not a Chicken Dish!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crust ingredients together. Press into a 9x13 inch pan.
2. Refrigerate until set.
3. Beat the cream cheese, powdered sugar, vanilla, and peanut butter until smooth.
4. Fold in the frozen whipped topping.
5. Pour over the chilled crust.
6. Drizzle with chocolate syrup and top with chopped peanuts.
7. Freeze for up to 6 weeks.
8. Serves 25-30.
